message:
feat(cli): expand close command with additional status transitions and simplify label handling

- Expand close command with richer status transition logic and improved
  output formatting for batch close operations
- Simplify label command implementation by removing redundant validation
- Expand e2e label tests with additional coverage for edge cases

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
